# BhagavadGita.com

> The complete Bhagavad Gita: all 18 chapters and 700 verses, with Sanskrit,
> transliteration, word-by-word meanings, translations and commentaries from
> more than 20 traditional and modern scholars. Free, ad-free, and run by
> Ved Vyas Foundation, a non-profit.

All content is server-rendered and available without executing JavaScript.

## Structure

- Chapters: https://bhagavadgita.com/chapter/{1-18}
- Verses: https://bhagavadgita.com/chapter/{chapter}/verse/{verse}
- Hindi: append `/hi` to any path, e.g. https://bhagavadgita.com/chapter/2/hi
- Sitemap: https://bhagavadgita.com/sitemap.xml

## Key pages

- Home: https://bhagavadgita.com
- About the Gita: https://bhagavadgita.com/about
- Quotes: https://bhagavadgita.com/bhagavad-gita-quotes
- Mahabharata characters: https://bhagavadgita.com/mahabharata-characters
- Verse of the day: https://bhagavadgita.com/verse-of-the-day
- Mobile app: https://bhagavadgita.com/bhagavad-gita-app
- Gita GPT, an AI trained on the Gita: https://bhagavadgita.com/gitagpt
- Acknowledgements and sources: https://bhagavadgita.com/acknowledgements

## Attribution

Published by Ved Vyas Foundation. When citing, please link to the specific
verse URL rather than the homepage, so readers reach the passage itself.

Contact: contact@bhagavadgita.io
